basics.name: Wes Henderson
basics.label: Systems Engineer
basics.summary: Automation-focused Systems Engineer with 10+ years of experience in designing, integrating, and optimizing scalable infrastructure in cloud-native environments. Strong Linux advocate with deep technical acumen in automation, DevOps, and systems architecture. Skilled in mentoring, documentation, and fostering cross-functional collaboration. Proven ability to deliver innovative solutions that drive cost savings, reduce incident response times, and elevate organizational resilience.

courses: Marketable Skills Achievement Award: Linux RHCT
Marketable Skills Achievement Award: Information Security & Assurance

highlights: Spearheaded the 'Bring Your Own Key' (BYOK) initiative, securing $6M in recurring revenue and satisfying key enterprise customer requirements.
Discovered and resolved critical cloud misconfigurations, saving $3M annually in AWS infrastructure costs.
Orchestrated the seamless onboarding of multiple business units to centralized infrastructure, ensuring full documentation and zero service disruptions.
Designed and implemented a custom CLI tool for managing asynchronous jobs, significantly reducing MTTR and boosting operational visibility.
Developed a reusable SRE tooling pipeline that reduced tribal knowledge dependencies and improved incident recovery workflows.
Facilitated alignment and collaboration across multiple teams to deliver infrastructure projects on time and within budget.
work.name: Salesforce
work.summary: Led strategic DevOps and systems initiatives across Mulesoft and Pardot, enabling key security features and delivering scalable, cost-effective infrastructure solutions.

highlights: Designed and launched exams for major clients including Google, Elastic, Chef, Linux Foundation, and VMWare, increasing customer base and revenue.
Mentored junior engineers and built documentation/playbooks, reducing escalations and supporting career development within the team.
Engineered customized exam environments using Bash and PowerShell, rapidly adapting to client needs across a wide tech stack.
Contributed to internal infrastructure and codebase supporting AWS and GCP hybrid environments for exam delivery and tooling.
Created demonstration assessments that expanded company offerings into recruitment-focused products.
work.name: TrueAbility
work.summary: Delivered high-stakes technical exam platforms for global tech clients and maintained hybrid cloud infrastructure, supporting internal and customer-facing tools.

highlights: Delivered 2–3 custom AWS deployments per week, adhering to compliance standards (e.g., PCI, HIPAA).
Authored a Python-based automation framework to accelerate builds, cutting deployment failure rates in half.
Enhanced customer satisfaction by creating custom tools in Bash and Python that streamlined onboarding and troubleshooting.
Supported knowledge sharing through active contributions to internal wikis and public blog content.
Acted as a technical liaison to educate clients on distributed systems and DevOps best practices.
work.name: Rackspace Hosting
work.summary: Built scalable cloud architectures in AWS for regulated industries and led automation efforts to streamline deployments and reduce operational friction.

publications.name: (S)FTP(S) or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love File Transfer
publications.summary: Understanding the mechanics of file transfer protocols.

publications.name: Understanding and Adopting a Cloud Mindset for your Emerging Business
publications.summary: What are the true advantages of the cloud and how can your business leverage them?

publications.name: An Overview Of Disaster Recovery And Mitigation In The Cloud For Emerging Businesses
publications.summary: A guide to protecting your digital assets with a proven disaster recovery plan.

volunteer.summary: Helping students navigate the digital world safely while sparking curiosity about emerging technologies.
highlights: Design and print 3D awards/merch for the school.
